title: No one can dictate to me what order to pass: Delhi High Court in ED plea to expunge remarks in Excise Policy discharge order
description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday sought replies to a plea filed by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) to expunge adverse remarks made against it by a trial court while discharging Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia and all the others accused in the Delhi Excise Policy case. At the outset of the hearing, Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma said,"It has nothing to do with the case in question. I will decide this. I am going through this. I do need to call for a reply in this. I will see if they [observations]
